title: Add a unique, auto-indexing Form number to a Form to become Item-ID
excerpt: It would be helpful to include a unique, auto-indexing form number when a form is submitted. Some flexibility in the form number would also be helpful. The form creator should be able to indicate the first number in the …

posts.author: APW_WB (Andrew Wasson)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful to include a unique, auto-indexing form number when a form is submitted. Some flexibility in the form number would also be helpful. The form creator should be able to indicate the first number in the sequence, so the number of digits is defined. The form creator should also be able to define a descriptive form number prefix. So, a form defined with a first number of 00001 and a descriptive prefix of "Work Request # " would create an auto index Item-ID column when a form is submitted of:
Work Request #00001
Work Request #00002
…
Work Request #99999

posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @APW_WB have you checked out the Auto ID app on the app marketplace? It does exactly this
